_meta.comment: Dialog pools for NEXUS Clippy. Each key is a 'moment' — the JS dispatcher picks a random line from the matching pool, with last-3 anti-repeat (persisted in localStorage). Add lines freely; one entry per array element.

login_peek: Can I join your adventure today?
I won't be in the way. Promise.
Working solo today? I'm right here.
I do tips. I do tricks. Mostly tips.
after_yes: I'll try not to be annoying. Mostly.
after_no: Got it. I'll be over here.
Saving my best stuff for next time.
OK. *peeks out one more time anyway*
morning: Today feels like a 4-mop kind of day.
I dreamed about COMEDOR last night.
One more day, one more shine.
Good morning. The dust never sleeps.
midday: Brief check-in: any of this fun yet?
afternoon_slump: It's the part of the day where time gets weird.
evening: Push through. I believe in you.
late_night: …closing tonight? Tap me if you need a hand.
Ghost of the night shift, reporting in.
Brave of you, working at this hour.
monday: Mondays test you. Pass the test.
friday: Big shifts ahead. Big tips ahead.
sunday: Let the week breathe before it starts.
streak_milestone: I'd give you a medal but I have no hands.
this is unsustainable. (in a good way.)
task_overdue_passive: the hood is looking at me funny.
no rush. except a little rush.
photo_failed: Uploads acting up. Want me to try again later?
We'll get it. Try once more?
note_added: I'll keep an eye on it.
idle_random: have you ever really LOOKED at a paperclip?
I don't have a stomach but I'd eat tacos.
do you think the broom misses being used?
I forgot what I was about to say.
is anyone else hot or is it just me
sometimes I just stare at the ceiling.
philosophy break: are we all paperclips?
I tried to balance on my head once. did not work.
100_clicks_unlock: you've earned this. *chef hat falls on head*
100 clicks. Look at us. *puts on chef hat*
thanks. it itches a little. *adjusts hat*
do_not_disturb_off: Did you miss me? You can say no.
do_not_disturb_on: Quiet mode on. I'll be here. Silently.
comeback_after_dismiss: you can say no again. it's fine.
comeback_after_long_absence: It's been a while. How've you been?
offer_brain: Want to talk to the brain?
Need real answers? I know two people.
The brain is up. Want to talk?
describe_providentia: She'll think it through with you.
describe_trajan: He'll just tell you what to do.
trajan_quote_intro: In the words of our scary friend:
trajan_quote_corpus: What is to be done, do quickly.
He who hesitates is mopped over.
The empire was not built in a day. But it was cleaned daily.
Hands of iron. Floors of marble.
Discipline is the soul of an army. And of bathrooms.
Fix it now or fix it twice.
Mop the floor before it becomes a story.
Steel sharpens steel. Stone sharpens steel. Bleach sharpens stone.
A clean kitchen is a quiet kitchen.
Order is not given. Order is taken.
If it is not done, it does not exist.
Repetition is the mother of mastery.
offer_song_stressed: Are you stressed? Want to hear my favorite song?
Need a break? I've got a song.
You've been at this a while. Music?
Pssst. I have a song for moments like this.
Hey... my favorite song. Want to listen?
I think this song will help.
offer_song_random: Random thought: want to hear my song?
I love this track. Want a listen?
I have a song. It's good.
song_ended: OK. We can do hard things now.
first_time_education: These are how-to guides! Tap a category to start.
Welcome to Education. Big library energy.
Tap a category. Then a guide. Easy.
first_time_cleaning: Tap a task to mark it done.
The pill at the top filters by person. Try it.
Long list! Use 'Today' for the short one.
discover_shift_pattern: You can pick different people for AM vs PM shifts!
Edit a task → Shift pattern → Both. Magic.
discover_guide_link: You can link how-to guides to any cleaning task.
Edit task → 'Link guide'. Staff sees a 📖 button.
discover_before_after: Hold the camera button for before/after photos.
discover_voice_note: Hold the note button to record a voice memo.
discover_person_filter: That pill at the top? Tap it. Switch whose view you see.
Want to see Maria's tasks? Person pill, top of list.
discover_education_kiosk: Long-press a guide to pin it to this tablet.
anniversary: {NAME} has been crushing it for {N} years!
april_fools: I am a serious assistant. *adjusts glasses*
Today I am taking myself very seriously.
command_palette_empty: Type to search. I know where everything is.
I can take you anywhere in the app.
command_palette_no_results: Hmm. Nothing matches. Try different words?
I don't know that one. Sorry.
